## Week in Review: 2026-05-18 to 2026-05-24

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 9.7.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 2.9 (-35.5% WoW), sentiment: negative (-0.15)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.4 (-15.0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.6 (-15.4% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 9.7 (-27.7% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.13)
